title: Deadfast Ant Killer Plus Spray 750ml
features: EFFECTIVE ON MULTIPLE PESTS - Effective control against ants as well as silverfish woodlice and cockroaches
LONG LASTING EFFECT - The microencapsulated formula provides a slow release action which remains effective for up to 3 months
NEST CONTROL - Contaminated worker ants carry the poison to the nest contributing to nest elimination
CONTAINS LAMBDA-CYHALOTHRIN - Use Biocides safely Always read the label and product information before use
description: From the manufacturer DEADFAST ANT KILLER PLUS SPRAY ADVANCED PEST CONTROL SOLUTIONS TO PROTECT YOUR FAMILY AND HOME DEADFAST ANT KILLER PLUS SPRAY Deadfast Ant Killer Plus Spray is a ready-to-use formula for effective control against ants. Its unique formulation contaminates the worker ants that carry the poison to the nest, giving total colony control. Our ready-to-use spray can be easily applied both indoors and outdoors for effective ant control. The addition of a bittering agent prevents accidental ingestion by non-target organisms, making it safer to use around children and pets. Ready to use spray Total colony control Long-lasting effect Also kills cockroaches Long-Lasting Control The DEADFAST ANT KILLER PLUS SPRAY contains a unique microencapsulated formula that sticks to the ant’s body. Its slow release action allows the contaminated ants to carry the poison back to the nest, contributing to total colony control that remains effective up to 3 months. This unique spray also provides control against silverfish, woodlice and cockroaches. This ready-to-use spray also offers a no mess application with no annoying spray deposits or unpleasant odours left behind. The spray is easy to use and can be applied both inside the home, as well as outdoors on paths, patios and around buildings. How to use For Use Against Ants: • Before use, set the spray adjuster to a ‘Spray’ or ‘Stream’ setting. Treat paths travelled by ants and nest entrances (outdoors), by spraying 10 times per 1m. • The formula provides fast action within hours, and total nest elimination within 2-3 weeks. For Use Against Other insects: • Spray surfaces 5-6 times in various places where the insects have been seen. • Silverfish: use every 2 weeks if a new infestation is seen. • Woodlice: use every 26 weeks if a new infestation is seen. • Cockroaches: porous surfaces; every week, non-porous surfaces; every 24 weeks. For long lasting effects – do not clean surface until pests are controlled. ALWAYS READ THE FULL LABEL & PRODUCT INFORMATION BEFORE USE.
